property.name: text1
property.value: * A GamerSupps Station,[wait:5] where you can heal, save, store, and swap party leaders.

property.name: text2
property.value: * A note on the machine says:

property.name: text3
property.value: * "We do not support anything a certain VTuber may or may not have said.

property.name: text4
property.value: * Thank you for your patronage.[wait:7] Use code AWESOMESAUCE to get 10% off at checkout!"
